title: Advanced Streaming UI for AI Apps using React/ Next.js
description: Explored advanced streaming UI techniques for AI applications using React and Next.js, focusing on real-time feedback and performance.

description: A journey through open-source product development, from ideation to launch, told through a personal story.

description: Introduction to HPC concepts and Guro within the Python ecosystem, explaining why decentralized computing is essential.

description: Mentoring future developers on the core fundamentals of AI development and career paths in the industry.

description: A comprehensive overview of AI ethics, focusing on responsible AI usage, privacy concerns, and security measures to ensure safe AI deployment in various sectors.

description: A practical workshop designed to guide participants through the process of training AI models, covering essential techniques, tools, and best practices for effective model development.

title: Leverage AI in Business and Management shifting Paradigms
description: Exploring the impact of AI on business processes, decision-making, and management strategies, with a focus on real-world applications and case studies.
